subcodes.first_line: O Fatimih! The divines of the earth are, in this day, debarred from the Most Exalted Horizon, whilst thou hast attained thereunto throughout ages and centuries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا فاطمه علمای ارض الیوم از افق اعلی ممنوعند و تو بان فائز در قرون و اعصار
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @nearness and remoteness, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God
